{{Quote|I do not create the letters of notification myself, of course. I set policy. Will this week's notifications bear a tone more of regret or pride? When siblings fall on the same day, does the family receive a joint notification or separate ones? These sorts of matters are very important...|Uliaff ke Unthos to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="soa" />}}
'''Uliaff ke Unthos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] from the nation of [[Cartann]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. He served as the [[Minister of Notification]] and was responsible for sending out notification letters to the family members of Cartann duelists, informing them of the [[Death/Legends|death]] of their kin.

In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], ke Unthos had the honor of being introduced to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during [[Red Flight]]'s—a group composed of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] veterans—diplomatic [[Mission to Adumar|mission]] to the planet.<ref name="soa" />

He wore a [[Perfume/Legends|perfume]] that seemed to Antilles as sweet and strong as an orchard full of rotting [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]].<ref name="soa" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
